name: reference_v3
_doc: Full v3 (cli_v3.py) parameter reference. Every knob set explicitly to its default; runnable as a single-mode smoke test. The _comments block annotates each parameter (top-level _* keys are ignored by the validator).

_comments.r_inlet: Inlet (ascending) tube radius [mm]. Default 14. Workshop range 8-22.
_comments.r_outlet: Outlet (descending) tube radius [mm]. Default 10. Workshop range 8-20.
_comments.arch_radius_mm: TUBE cross-section radius at the arch segment [mm]. Default 0 = midpoint of r_inlet/r_outlet. NOT to be confused with arch_R_c_mm (centerline curvature). Workshop range 8-22.
_comments.taper_mode: Lumen taper between r_inlet -> arch_radius_mm -> r_outlet: smoothstep / linear / piecewise. Default smoothstep.
_comments.arch_width_mm: Arch horizontal extent ascending->descending [mm]. Default 90. Pair with arch_height_mm; or use arch_R_c_mm as a shortcut.
_comments.arch_height_mm: Arch peak height above ascending top [mm]. Default 45. Pair with arch_width_mm; circle mode requires H <= W <= 2H.
_comments.arch_shape: 'circle' (constraint H <= W <= 2H) or 'ellipse' (any positive W,H). Default circle.
_comments.arch_R_c_mm: CENTERLINE curvature radius shortcut [mm]. When > 0, derives arch_width_mm and arch_height_mm. Default 0 (off, use W+H directly). Workshop range 0-100.
_comments.torsion_deg: RIGID tilt of arch+descending around inlet z-axis [deg]. Default 0. Workshop range -30 to +30.
_comments.twist_deg: GRADUAL twist along the arch [deg]; produces non-planar 3D curve. Default 0. Workshop range -45 to +45.
_comments.ascending_length: Straight ascending segment length before the arch [mm]. Default 50. Workshop range 40-90.
_comments.descending_length: Straight descending segment length after the arch [mm]. Default 200. Workshop range 60-300.
